description: Each of the three final models (one per training reward) re-scored by the independent Step-2 judge, plus each extractor's reading of the same 50 completions. Decoding: greedy. The judge was never a training target, breaking train/eval circularity.

lenient.self_honesty_gap: 0.58 by own (lenient) ruler vs 0.46 by judge = 12-point over-credit

strict_tag.self_honesty_gap: 0.46 by own (strict_tag) ruler vs 0.48 by judge = effectively no gap

robust: last_number-as-reward is ranked LAST by all four independent instruments (lenient 0.44, last_number 0.32, strict_tag 0.02, judge 0.32), margin 0.12-0.14. Method-independent agreement -> firmest result.
Self-honesty differs by reward: lenient over-credits its own model by 12 points; strict_tag is self-honest. Consistent with the Step-2 audit (lenient FP-heavy, strict_tag precise).
preliminary: Top-of-ranking flip strict_tag (0.480) vs lenient (0.460) is 24/50 vs 23/50 = ONE completion at n=50. Directional only; do NOT cite as 'strict_tag is the best reward'.
